sentences.english: I love horror movies even though they terrify me.
I only watch comedies because life is already stressful enough.
I want to laugh, not cry.
sentences.korean: 인생이 이미 충분히 스트레스니까요. 울고 싶지 않고 웃고 싶어요.

sentences.english: I love documentaries because you learn something real, and some of them are more exciting than fiction.
sentences.korean: 다큐멘터리를 좋아해요. 진짜를 배울 수 있으니까요. 어떤 건 픽션보다 더 흥미진진해요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
